message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 181 — workflow per-step cancel seam

RusticMaple: step loop inside run_workflow_inner now checks cx at
each iteration. On cancel: full cleanup (fail_execution, mark_
trigger, lock release, terminal audit) + Error result. Biggest
cancellation surface in the runner — long workflows no longer
block indefinitely under upstream cancel. 31/31 runner tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
